title: On local and global regularity of Fourier integral operators
summary:
The aim of this paper is to give a review of local and global properties of
Fourier integral operators with real and complex phases, in local $L^p$, global
$L^2$, and in Colombeau's spaces.

title: Dispersion and asymptotic profiles for Kirchhoff equations
summary:
The aim of this article is to describe asymptotic profiles for the Kirchhoff
equation, and to establish time decay properties and dispersive estimates for
Kirchhoff equations. For this purpose, the method of asymptotic integration is
developed for the corresponding linear equations and representation formulae
for their solutions are obtained. These formulae are analysed further to obtain
the time decay rate of $L^p$--$L^q$ norms of propagators for the corresponding
Cauchy problems.
